mapper.select: SELECT refund_order_id AS refundOrderId, payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, order_no AS orderNo, customer_name AS customerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(refund_amount, 2)) AS refundAmount, refund_method AS refundMethod, status, status_type AS statusType, DATE_FORMAT(applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS appliedAt, CASE WHEN success_at IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(success_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS successAt FROM t_refund_order WHERE refund_order_id = #{refundOrderId}

SELECT payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, order_no AS orderNo, customer_name AS customerName, amount AS paidAmount, status, payment_method AS paymentMethod FROM t_payment_order WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(refund_amount), 0) FROM t_refund_order WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId} AND status IN ('REVIEWING', 'PROCESSING', 'SUCCESS')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_refund_order(refund_order_id, payment_order_id, order_no, customer_name, refund_amount, refund_method, status, status_type, applied_at, success_at) VALUES (#{refundOrderId}, #{source.paymentOrderId}, #{source.orderNo}, #{source.customerName}, #{request.refundAmount}, #{request.refundMethod}, #{status}, #{statusType}, NOW(), NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE t_refund_order SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, success_at = CASE WHEN #{success} THEN NOW() WHEN #{status} = 'PROCESSING' THEN NULL ELSE success_at END WHERE refund_order_id = #{refundOrderId} AND status = #{fromStatus}
